image_prompts.prompt: Hook visual: Lymph nodes are immune checkpoints where cells meet antigens.
Context visual: These tiny structures might seem small, but they’re essential in our defense.
Escalation visual: When pathogens invade, lymph nodes spring into action, gathering immune cells.
Evidence visual: Research shows they can influence how effectively our immune system responds.
Payoff visual: So, next time you feel under the weather, remember the unseen battle within.
Cta visual: Curious about more science insights? Hit that follow button!
